items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Fiserv, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Micron & more
items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：Fiserv、Crinetics Pharmaceuticals、Micron 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早盘交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Far more real estate agents now report seeing a balanced market, CNBC Housing Market Survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 住房市场调查发现，现在有更多的房地产经纪人表示看到了平衡的市场
items.desc_en: Agents who reported at least one price cut to active listings dropped dramatically from prior surveys.
items.desc_zh: 与之前的调查相比，报告活跃房源至少一次降价的代理商数量大幅下降。

items.title_en: Nasdaq futures fall as chip stocks struggle: Live updates
items.title_zh: 由于芯片股陷入困境，纳斯达克期货下跌：实时更新
items.desc_en: Monday night's action follows a winning session on Wall Street.
items.desc_zh: 周一晚间，华尔街股市上涨。

items.title_en: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
items.title_zh: 涉嫌摩纳哥炸弹袭击的妇女在乌克兰被发现死亡
items.desc_en: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.
items.desc_zh: 一名乌克兰百万富翁在爆炸中受伤后，警方一直在追捕阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡。

items.title_en: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
items.title_zh: 马克龙访问大马士革期间发生爆炸，造成18人受伤
items.desc_en: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.
items.desc_zh: 随着爆炸事件的报道传来，国家电视台称叙利亚总统在总统府欢迎了马克龙。

items.title_en: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
items.title_zh: 津巴布韦足球明星在南非遭枪击后幸存
items.desc_en: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.
items.desc_zh: 南非警方表示，他们正在调查一起谋杀未遂案，但迄今为止尚未逮捕任何人。

items.title_en: Buy the dip on this struggling solar stock, says Deutsche Bank
items.title_zh: 德意志银行表示，逢低买入这只陷入困境的太阳能股
items.desc_en: The bank upgraded the solar name to buy from hold.
items.desc_zh: 该银行将太阳能名称从持有上调至买入。

items.title_en: Ukrainian drones hit Russia’s largest oil refinery as Zelenskyy says Siberia now ‘within reach’
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯最大的炼油厂，泽连斯基称西伯利亚现在“触手可及”
items.desc_en: The attack underscores Kyiv's enhanced long-range drone capabilities and comes on the eve of a crucial NATO summit.
items.desc_zh: 这次袭击突显了基辅增强的远程无人机能力，并且发生在一次重要的北约峰会前夕。

items.title_en: Oil prices rise after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡商船后油价上涨
items.desc_en: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 在伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡商船的报道后，布伦特原油和美国原油期货上涨。

items.title_en: Billionaire John Arnold commits $2.6 million to study online sports betting risk
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁约翰·阿诺德投入 260 万美元研究在线体育博彩风险
items.desc_en: John Arnold, who runs Arnold Ventures with his wife, Laura, is investing $2.6 million for university research into potential harms of online sports betting.
items.desc_zh: 约翰·阿诺德 (John Arnold) 与妻子劳拉 (Laura) 共同经营阿诺德风险投资公司 (Arnold Ventures)，他正投资 260 万美元用于大学研究在线体育博彩的潜在危害。

items.title_en: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
items.title_zh: 观看：罕见的龙卷风袭击中国中部城市
items.desc_en: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.
items.desc_zh: 与英国广播公司分享的视频显示，风暴席卷湖北省鄂州和黄冈时，碎片在空中飞舞。

items.title_en: India's landmark Ram temple overhauls board after alleged theft of donations
items.title_zh: 印度地标性建筑拉姆神庙因涉嫌盗窃捐款而对董事会进行大修
items.desc_en: Questions have been raised over alleged theft of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.
items.desc_zh: 人们对信徒提供的现金、贵重珠宝、金银的涉嫌盗窃行为提出了质疑。

items.title_en: Why oil investors fear the next toll fight could be the Strait of Malacca
items.title_zh: 为什么石油投资者担心下一场收费战可能是马六甲海峡
items.desc_en: The prospect of fees to transit the Strait of Hormuz has sparked alarm, not least by investors who fear it could be replicated in other maritime corridors.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡收费的前景引发了恐慌，尤其是投资者担心这种情况可能会在其他海上走廊复制。

items.title_en: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯猛烈袭击后泽连斯基敦促北约提供防空系统
items.desc_en: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统将利用在土耳其举行的北约会议来表明他需要更多拦截导弹。

items.title_en: World Cup in photos: Belgium beats U.S. 4-1 after Balogun controversy, Ronaldo exits
items.title_zh: 世界杯照片：巴洛贡争议后比利时4-1击败美国，C罗退出
items.desc_en: The U.S. is out of the World Cup, losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16 in a match blemished by suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card. Ronaldo exits.
items.desc_zh: 美国队在世界杯 16 强赛中以 4-1 输给比利时队，因福拉林·巴洛贡 (Folarin Balogun) 红牌停赛而退出世界杯。罗纳尔多退出。

items.title_en: Trump heads to Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
items.title_zh: 特朗普前往土耳其，北约因俄罗斯袭击而紧张，美国不耐烦
items.desc_en: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普经常抱怨北约成员国在针对伊朗的行动中拒绝听从美国的帮助清理霍尔木兹海峡的呼吁。

items.title_en: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
items.title_zh: 韩华海洋因未能竞标建造加拿大下一批潜艇而股价下跌 23%
items.desc_en: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.
items.desc_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼周一宣布，德国蒂森克虏伯海洋系统公司将成为交付潜艇的首选供应商。

items.title_en: Resistance and revenge - Iran wanted to send a message with its farewell to Khamenei
items.title_zh: 抵抗与报复——伊朗想通过告别哈梅内伊传递一个信息
items.desc_en: Three days of public mourning in Tehran was a political spectacle Iran's leaders wanted the world to see, writes the BBC's international correspondent Lyse Doucet.
items.desc_zh: BBC 国际记者 Lyse Doucet 写道，德黑兰为期三天的公众哀悼是伊朗领导人希望全世界看到的政治奇观。

items.title_en: Samsung Electronics sees record preliminary 2Q profit but shares fall
items.title_zh: 三星电子第二季度初步利润创历史新高，但股价下跌

items.title_en: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 曝光俄罗斯在乌克兰“酷刑监狱”的狱卒和官员
items.desc_en: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.
items.desc_zh: 前囚犯指控这些人在拘留中心实施虐待，并希望看到他们受到审判。

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: LongCat-2.0
items.title_zh: LongCat-2.0
items.desc_en: 1.6T MoE trained entirely on AI ASICs
items.desc_zh: 1.6T MoE 完全基于 AI ASIC 进行训练

items.title_en: Platner Senate campaign taking 'time to reflect' on path forward after sexual assault allegation
items.title_zh: 普拉特纳参议院竞选团队在性侵犯指控后花时间反思前进的道路
items.desc_en: Platner and his campaign denied the accusations made by 41-year-old Maine resident Jenny Racicot in a POLITICO article published Monday.
items.desc_zh: 普拉特纳和他的竞选团队在周一发表的《政治》文章中否认了 41 岁缅因州居民珍妮·拉西科特的指控。

items.title_en: Trump Accounts are live. Here's how some families plan to use them
items.title_zh: 特朗普账户已上线。以下是一些家庭计划如何使用它们
items.desc_en: As Trump Accounts launch, millions of parents are figuring out how the new investment accounts fit with their family's financial goals.
items.desc_zh: 随着特朗普账户的推出，数百万家长正在研究新的投资账户如何符合他们家庭的财务目标。

items.title_en: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
items.title_zh: 丰田将投资 36 亿美元将塔科马皮卡生产从墨西哥转移到德克萨斯州
items.desc_en: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.
items.desc_zh: 丰田表示，将投资 36 亿美元将塔科马中型皮卡车的生产从墨西哥转移到德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥制造园区。

items.title_en: Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder
items.title_zh: 查理·柯克的家人出席被指控谋杀的嫌疑人的听证会
items.desc_en: Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA.
items.desc_zh: 23 岁的泰勒·罗宾逊 (Tyler Robinson) 被指控谋杀了特朗普的重要盟友、青年组织“美国转折点”的创始人柯克。

items.title_en: More than 1,000 arrested as part of global human trafficking crackdown
items.title_zh: 全球打击人口贩卖行动逾千人被捕
items.desc_en: Interpol says the vast majority of the 2,070 victims or potential victims identified were women being trafficked for sex.
items.desc_zh: 国际刑警组织表示，在已确定的 2,070 名受害者或潜在受害者中，绝大多数是被贩卖从事性交易的女性。

items.title_en: Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court
items.title_zh: 奥地利法院判定前叙利亚情报局长犯有酷刑和性虐待罪
items.desc_en: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad
items.desc_zh: 两名前叙利亚官员在奥地利维也纳接受审判，被控对叙利亚前领导人巴沙尔·阿萨德的反对者犯有罪行

items.title_en: Kadoink
items.title_zh: Kadoink
items.desc_en: Gather people instantly by ringing their phones directly
items.desc_zh: 直接拨打电话即可立即聚集人员

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.title_zh: 特朗普证实他要求国际足联审查巴洛贡禁令
items.desc_en: United States President Donald Trump says Fifa "made the right decision" to suspend Folarin Balogun's one-match ban, adding that otherwise, it would have left a "big stain" on the World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，国际足联暂停对福拉林·巴洛贡的一场比赛禁令“做出了正确的决定”，并补充说，否则，这将给世界杯留下“巨大污点”。

items.title_en: Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡监狱骚乱已造成26人死亡、100多人受伤
items.desc_en: The two days of violence at Negombo Prison are the worst prison riots in the country in years.
items.desc_zh: 尼甘布监狱这两天的暴力事件是该国多年来最严重的监狱骚乱。

items.title_en: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
items.title_zh: 法国南部山火迫使10,000人疏散
items.desc_en: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.
items.desc_zh: 由于野火袭击东比利牛斯地区，环法自行车赛组织者禁止观众观看第三赛段。

items.desc_en: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.
items.desc_zh: 法国全国集会领袖在 2027 年总统选举前的民意调查中领先，现在将看看她是否能参选。

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？

items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？

items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。
